zh.Chevening, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭肯特設維寧
zh.Clavering, Essex, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭艾可可拉維林
zh.lifeSummary: 當George Lennard Esquire於1429年出生在英國肯特設維寧時，他的父親John Lennard II30歲，母親Sarah Ann of Clavering30歲。他於1450年與Matilda Maud Dutton在英國肯特設維寧結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1462年在他的家鄉享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Lennard Esquire于1429年出生在英国肯特設維寧时，他的父亲John Lennard II30岁，母亲Sarah Ann of Clavering30岁。他于1450年与Matilda Maud Dutton在英国肯特設維寧结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1462年在他的家乡享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lennard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Lennert   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Leonard
meanings: English; French (Léonard); Walloon (mainly Léonard): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements leo ‘lion’ (a late addition to the vocabulary of ancient Germanic name elements, taken from Latin) + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, which was taken to England by the Normans. A Christian saint of this name, who is supposed to have lived in the 6th century, but about whom nothing is known except for a largely fictional life dating from half a millennium later, was popular throughout Europe in the early Middle Ages and was regarded as the patron of peasants and horses. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Leonardo , Polish, Slovenian, etc. Lenart or Lenard , and probably also their derivatives. Compare Larned , Learned , and Yenor .
Irish (Fermanagh): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Fhionáin or of Langan .
German: variant of   Leonhard  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When George Lennard Esquire was born in 1429, in Chevening, Kent, England, his father, John Lennard II, was 30 and his mother, Sarah Ann of Clavering, was 30. He married Matilda Maud Dutton in 1450, in Chevening, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1462, in his hometown, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Lennard Esquire est né en 1429, à Chevening, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Lennard II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sarah Ann of Clavering, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Maud Dutton en 1450, à Chevening, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1462, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Lennard Esquire 1429 in Chevening, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Lennard II 30 und seine Mutter Sarah Ann of Clavering 30. Er hat 1450 in Chevening, Kent, England Matilda Maud Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1462 im Alter von 34 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Lennard Esquire è nato il nel 1429 nel Chevening, Kent, England, il suo padre, John Lennard II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Ann of Clavering, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Maud Dutton nel 1450, nel Chevening, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1462, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: George Lennard Esquireが1429年にイギリスケントチェベニングで生まれた時，父John Lennard IIは30歳，母Sarah Ann of Claveringは30歳であった。1450年にイギリスケントチェベニングでMatilda Maud Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1462年に故郷で34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Lennard Esquire(이)가 1429년 영국 켄트 처베닝에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lennard II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Ann of Clavering(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1450년 영국 켄트 처베닝에서 Matilda Maud Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1462년 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Lennard Esquire nasceu em 1429, em Chevening, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Lennard II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Ann of Clavering, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Maud Dutton em 1450, em Chevening, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1462, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Lennard Esquire родился в 1429 г. в местности чевенинг, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Lennard II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Ann of Clavering, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Maud Dutton в 1450 г. в местности чевенинг, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1462 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Lennard Esquire nació en 1429, en Chevening, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Lennard II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Sarah Ann of Clavering, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Matilda Maud Dutton en 1450, en Chevening, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1462, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años.
